role: Test suite for validating index-based resume recovery and LLM retry mechanisms in the ArchSpine mirror system.
responsibility: Provides comprehensive tests for index recovery from corrupted states and LLM retry error classification, ensuring resilience and correct behavior of the mirror system's recovery workflows.

children.role: Vitest test suite for validating index-based resume recovery and LLM retry mechanisms in the ArchSpine system.
